choices.text: Sat/vB (satoshis per virtual byte). Total fee = tx size × sat/vB. P2PKH ~226 vB, P2WPKH ~141 vB, Taproot ~111 vB. Smaller tx types save fees proportionally.

questions.explanation: Fees in sat/vB; tx size matters.

questions.prompt: Tx stuck due to low fee?

choices.text: RBF (Replace-By-Fee) if tx signaled it — replace with higher-fee version. Or CPFP (Child-Pays-For-Parent): receiver spends output in high-fee tx, miner must include parent. Both bumb effective fee rate.

questions.explanation: RBF or CPFP for fee acceleration.
